overview: A premium multi-page handmade products eCommerce website with a warm, earthy aesthetic. Features a full shop with category filters, product detail pages with image galleries, artisan story page, customer reviews, and a working cart with checkout demo.
features: 6 pages: Home, Shop, Product Details, Our Story, Reviews, Contact
Wishlist with heart icon toggles on product cards
Product filters by category, price, and popularity
Artisan profiles and brand story page
Related products on product detail pages
Warm earthy palette: beige, cream, terracotta, sage green
Playfair Display headings + Lato body typography
